info.name: War Economic Impact API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for the War Economic Impact Dataset. Includes standardized JSON responses, JWT-based authentication flows, and aggregated economic metrics.

request.description: Returns the system health, database connection state, and server uptime.
Get health status headers without the response body.
Returns API build version details.
Register a new user account. Returns a JWT token.
Authenticate user and receive a JWT token.
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Logs out user and clears cookie sessions.
Generates a reset token and returns it in the payload (dev mode fallback).
Resets the user's password using the generated token.
Returns a brand new valid JWT token if the current token has not expired.
Permits authenticated users to delete their own account.
Fetches a paginated list of all conflicts. Supports multi-field dynamic filtering, sorting, paginations, and full-text keyword searches.
Creates a new conflict entry. Requires 'Admin' or 'Researcher' authentication.
Fetch a single conflict record by its exact MongoDB ObjectId.
Replaces all data fields of an existing conflict entry.
Partially updates details of an existing conflict.
Flags a conflict as soft-deleted. Requires Admin privileges.
Returns a detailed statistical side-by-side comparison of two active conflicts.
Generates a comprehensive summary narrative of database metrics.
Perform full-text search across all indexed fields (names, regions, countries, etc.)
Filter conflicts using specific query-params.
Search by minimum ranges of economic loss/impact.
Retrieves computed aggregated calculations for the entire dataset.
